arts.ttl: Exclusive: Aston Villa's Marcus Rashford plans confirmed as Emery also enquires about £45m Chelsea man
arts.sum: TBR Football can confirm that Aston Villa have enquired about Marcus Rashford as they contemplate making an offer for the England international before the window...

arts.ttl: Aston Villa open talks to sign Man Utd outcast Rashford
arts.sum: However, now David Ornstein of The Athletic reports that Aston Villa have also opened talks to sign Man Utd outcast Rashford, who is still waiting to resolve his future after stating in December that he is 'ready for a new challenge.' Aston Villa open talks to sign Man Utd outcast Rashford - Ornstein

arts.ttl: Man United transfer news: Red Devils contact 'several agents' over deal for unwanted midfielder
arts.sum: Manchester United are reportedly in contact with several agents as they attempt to permanently offload Casemiro before the end of the winter transfer window.

arts.ttl: Aston Villa want Marcus Rashford: Premier League side 'join the race for Man United star' as boss Unai Emery 'makes personal request' to land Old Trafford wantaway ahead of Jhon Duran's exit
arts.sum: Aston Villa have entered the race for Manchester United forward Marcus Rashford. As reported by Fabrizio Romano, Villa could pursue a move for Rashford with Jhon Duran set to leave the club.

arts.ttl: Sir Jim Ratcliffe handed damning reality check as Man Utd fans make anger clear
arts.sum: Manchester United co-owner Sir Jim Ratcliffe has developed a penny-pinching reputation since investing in the Red Devils and angered supporters with his changes to ticket prices

arts.ttl: Transfer news and rumours today: Kaoru Mitoma to Al-Nassr, Tiago Djalo to Crystal Palace
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up the latest transfer news and rumours, including Kaoru Mitoma to Al-Nassr and Tiago Djalo to Crystal Palace.

arts.ttl: Manchester United: Ruben Amorim reveals Luke Shaw injury return plan amid talk of Patrick Dorgu medical
arts.sum: The defender’s season has been disrupted by injury

arts.ttl: Oliver Glasner delivers hopeful Crystal Palace transfer update with two new signings wanted
arts.sum: Eagles boss is hopeful of bringing in at least one more player over the coming days

arts.ttl: Amorim, Old Trafford & learnings: Glasner's pre-Man Utd conference
arts.sum: Manager Oliver Glasner hopes Crystal Palace can learn from their latest defeat – as they have done previously this season – when his side travel to Old Trafford to face Manchester United on Sunday.

arts.ttl: Man United transfers: Marcus Rashford to Barcelona has taken another twist
arts.sum: Manchester United star Marcus Rashford is facing an uncertain future at the club after constantly being dropped by manager Ruben Amorim. For their Europa League match this week, Rashford once again found himself out of the club but that has been the case for a number of weeks now and it is not surprising anymore.
